submit_spec.intent: Fine weak-pi pODMR refresh on accepted r03 before longer Ramsey/T2star follow-up; previous weak-pi calibration is older than 5 h and terminal det-shift Ramsey remains non-claim-grade.

metadata.no_auto_align_reason: Accepted r03 has continuous bridge provenance and the latest terminal Ramsey final counts are 44.796 kcps; use explicit tracked position and avoid hidden target reselection.

analysis_plan.notes: No automatic fit request is included. Review raw/readouts and normalization first; use refreshed center only after supported signal presence.

metadata.frequency_window_reason: Reuse 3.8745..3.8775 GHz / 31 points (0.1 MHz spacing): it covered the previous center and accommodates routine several-hundred-kHz drift while keeping the same successful weak-pi route.
metadata.shot_reason: Use 4 x 50000 = 200000 total shots per mw_freq point because the prior fine weak-pi scan was clear at this budget and this is a calibration refresh, not a publication-grade spectrum.
metadata.even_average_reason: Use 4 averages under snake/even-average guidance; terminal det-shift drift diagnostic flagged no averages.

metadata.no_auto_align_reason: Accepted r03 has continuous bridge provenance and the latest terminal Ramsey final counts are 44.796 kcps; use explicit tracked position and avoid hidden target reselection.

metadata.even_average_reason: Use 4 averages under snake/even-average guidance; terminal det-shift drift diagnostic flagged no averages.

warnings: sequence manifest pulsed_odmr_rabimodulated_v1 is in staging status and should stay limited to validate/dry_run until promoted.
Validation succeeded without touching 23-C hardware paths.
Execute remains separately gated by bootstrap and local lab validation.

recipe.name: xml_generic_v1
notes: Generic XML route backed by a sequence manifest.
This is the only mainline recipe in the bridge; ODMR, Rabi, Ramsey, and future sequences should all enter through xml_generic_v1.
validate_job.m resolves sequence_manifest_id and enforces manifest bounds before any execute path is reached; job sample_id owns target identity.
Execute remains subject to the same explicit lab-only opt-in gate used by earlier curated routes.
Archived curated wrappers and recipe definitions are preserved under claw/legacy for historical reference only.

manifest.label: Pulsed ODMR (Rabimodulated)
manifest.description: Staging proposal that repurposes Rabimodulated.xml for pulsed ODMR by scanning mw_freq while keeping the Rabimodulated pulse structure.
notes: Staging-only proposal requested after ODMR_withRef.xml hit a RunExperiment channel-shape mismatch while Rabimodulated.xml executed successfully.
Intended as a safer pulsed ODMR draft that keeps the Rabimodulated pulse structure and changes the scan axis to mw_freq.
Review the fixed length_rabi_pulse operating point before supervised execute.
Generated from base manifest rabi_v1.

Typed-only defaults overridden: ampIQ, delay_wrt_1mus, detuning, freqIQ, full_expt, length_last_wait, mod_depth, mw_ampl, mw_freq, pumping_time, sample_rate, sweep_range, sweep_time, switch_delay, wait_time
Manual post-edit after authoring: scan_schema narrowed to mw_freq for pulsed ODMR use.
Manual post-edit after authoring: added fixed length_rabi_pulse default (52 ns) and do_adiabatic_inversion typed default from Rabimodulated.xml.
2026-05-04 cleanup: retargeted manifest to canonical Rabimodulated.xml; obsolete staging XML copy was archived.
Loaded sequence manifest from <MATLAB_23C_ROOT>\claw\sequence_manifests\staging\pulsed_odmr_rabimodulated_v1.json.

tracking_cadence_policy.does_not_change: Imaging GUI or legacy Experiment tracking_period defaults
Imaging GUI or legacy Experiment tracking_period defaults

guidance.shot_preservation_guidance: When the predicted per-average tracking window is too long, first reduce repetitions per average and compensate by increasing averages so repetitions * averages remains as close as possible to the original total shots. If that is still insufficient, split the acquisition into shorter jobs. Reduce total shots only as a last resort.
adjustment_priority: raise averages to preserve repetitions * averages whenever possible
split the acquisition into shorter jobs before reducing total shots
reduce total shots only as a last resort

warnings: sequence manifest pulsed_odmr_rabimodulated_v1 is in staging status and should stay limited to validate/dry_run until promoted.
Validation succeeded without touching 23-C hardware paths.
Execute remains separately gated by bootstrap and local lab validation.
Applied acquisition settings from job.metadata: averages=4, repetitions=50000, average_continuously=0.
Forced experiment tracking_period=1 for bridge-configured runs.
notes: Preview uses execute metadata opt-in only.
Static bootstrap prerequisites are present.
Static preflight does not auto-launch the legacy GUI stack.
The hidden/invisible bootstrap path is still unverified on the Win7 lab stack.
Default execute remains blocked unless the separate lab-only queue gate opens the production bridge route.
Launched QEG.
Forced QEG into simulated PB+AWG mode for pre-enqueue preview.
Launched Imaging.
Launched Experiment.
Legacy QEG/Imaging/Experiment route is available for the bridge scaffold.
Experiment handles include the structural fields required for bridge payload injection and Setscan.
Built Experiment GUI payload from the bridge job.
Pulse mode already matched the selected sequence path (5).
Applied bridge-derived state to the Experiment handles.
Setscan completed and populated root appdata PSeq / ExperimentalScan.
Tracking is configured per average. Judge drift risk from drift_planning_window_seconds / per_average_seconds, not total_seconds. Changing averages does not shorten that window.
Built pre-enqueue runtime + drift advisory for agent-side acquisition planning.
